3093910.name: Dokkalfar: The Ballads of Vivi the Dark Elf
3093910.description:
A Dark Elf’s Tale in a Cursed World

Step into the role of Vivi, a lone dark elf venturing into the haunted, forbidden ruins of the Dokkalfar realm. Sealed powers, long thought destroyed, are awakening—and a malevolent sorcerer and their acolytes will stop at nothing to unleash their deadly magic. Armed with swift melee, shadow magic, and agile movement, you will battle nightmarish creatures, uncover hidden abilities, and explore perilous locales teeming with danger and mystery.

Story

Erasmus, the sorcerer, relentlessly hunts the lost palm scrolls of the Atnurak, capable of releasing powerful aberrant monsters into our realm. Remnants of these scrolls linger in ancient temples, towers, and other forgotten sites scattered across the land, and only a clever and resourceful dark elf can stop them.

Experience Vivi's journey through meticulously designed side-scrolling biomes filled with action, exploration, and secrets. Float and dash with Dark Elven agility, unleash devastating shadow magic, master a variety of weapons, and vanquish evil to save the Dokkalfar realm in this dark fantasy Action RPG adventure.

FEATURES

Fast-Paced Action Combat

  • Wield a variety of weapons and unleash powerful shadow magic

  • Float, dash, and strike with Dark Elven agility

  • Battle challenging enemies with unique attack patterns

Explore Hand-Crafted Dark-Fantasy Biomes

  • Venture through ancient temples, ruined towers, and forgotten sites

  • Discover hidden paths, environmental hazards, and secret treasures

  • Experience meticulously designed side-scrolling worlds filled with secrets

Magic, Upgrades, and Customization

  • Unlock new spells and abilities to suit your combat style

  • Enhance your skills and progression to tackle tougher foes

  • Adapt your strategy with versatile combat options

Atmospheric Storytelling

  • Follow Vivi’s journey to stop Erasmus and prevent the release of aberrant monsters

  • Meet memorable characters and uncover fragments of ancient lore

  • Immerse yourself in a dark-fantasy narrative woven through exploration and combat

Epic Boss Fights

  • Confront powerful aberrant monsters and corrupted foes

  • Learn enemy patterns, master your abilities, and emerge victorious
3093910.supported_languages:
英语*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 繁体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
